milestone.firstWinBody: Your first territory taken by force.

sitrep.streakAtRisk_one: Streak at risk — {{count}} day on the line.
sitrep.streakAtRisk_other: Streak at risk — {{count}} days on the line.
sitrep.attackDay: Attack Day. Attacks and defences open.

combat.first_blood: First to ever claim a territory. No prior owner in history.
combat.trophy_hunter: Offensive wins on territories of Legacy Rank 3 or higher.
combat.reclaimer: Reconquests within 72 hours of a loss.

defense.the_wall: Hold one territory through 5 defences in 90 days against 5 attackers.
defense.bulwark: Total successful defences, lifetime, any territory.
defense.guardian: Defensive wins on territories of Legacy Rank 3 or higher.
defense.immovable: Longest unbroken single-territory hold, in days.

distance.iron_legs: Longest single continuous walking session, km.
distance.daily_marcher: Days walked 5 km or more. Lifetime count.
distance.war_marcher: Cumulative km walked inside contest perimeters.

endurance.unbroken: Longest single continuous streak, in days.
endurance.eternal: 365-day streak. Once per lifetime. Year stamped.
endurance.time_served: Days lived under an active 7-day-or-longer streak.

signIn.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Check your email and password.
signIn.signUpFailed: Sign up failed. Try a different email.
signIn.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.emailSubtitle: Enter your email. We'll send a reset code.
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Code sent to {{email}}. Enter it with your new password.
forgotPassword.sendFailed: Couldn't send the code. Check the email and try again.
forgotPassword.resetFailed: Reset failed. Check the code and try again.

username.title: Choose your name
username.subtitle: This is how other Commanders will know you.
username.errorTooShort: Username must be at least 2 characters.
username.errorTooLong: Username must be 20 characters or less.
username.errorInvalidChars: Only letters, numbers, dots and underscores allowed.
username.errorGeneric: Couldn't save your name. Please try again.

sessionMismatch.label: Session error
sessionMismatch.title:
Account
not found
sessionMismatch.body1: Your sign-in does not match a player on this device.
sessionMismatch.body2: Sign out to recover, or retry if you just signed up.

authGate.couldNotCheckSession: Could not check your session. Please retry.

onboarding.typewriterBody: Your city is the game board.
onboarding.row1Sub: Walk a territory's perimeter distance — from anywhere — to own it.
onboarding.row2Sub: Attack enemy ground. Hold your own when it comes under fire.
onboarding.row3Sub: Coordinate with 19 others to hold your city.
onboarding.locationSub: To show you the map and count your walks.
onboarding.stepCounterSub: Steps convert directly into claimed ground.
onboarding.privacyBody: Your location is never visible to other players.
onboarding.setCitySub: This sets the city you play for.
onboarding.claimNext: Claim them on your next walk.
onboarding.alertSessionErrorBody: Player ID missing. Please restart the app.
onboarding.alertCouldNotSaveBody: Please check your connection and try again.

activeClaim.bannerHcDenied: HEALTH CONNECT NOT GRANTED · Steps cannot be read
activeClaim.bannerGpsWeak: GPS WEAK · Vehicle filter on hold
activeClaim.toastNotParticipant: You're not part of this contest.

claimSuccess.errIntentExpiredPaid: Your claim expired. {{gold}} gold has been forfeited.
claimSuccess.errAlreadyClaimedFree: Another player claimed this territory while you walked.
claimSuccess.errAlreadyClaimedPaid: Another player claimed this territory while you walked. {{gold}} gold forfeited.
claimSuccess.errIntentNotFound: Couldn't find your claim. Tap to retry.
claimSuccess.errNetwork: Lost connection — your claim may have completed. Tap to retry.
claimSuccess.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Tap to retry.

attackWon.headline: Yours.
attackWon.consequence:
{{opponent}} HELD THIS GROUND.
YOU ARE NOW IN THE HALL OF HOLDERS.

attackLost.headline: Held.
attackLost.consequence:
{{diff}} METRES SHORT.
STREAK INTACT. RECONTEST WHEN READY.

defendLost.headline: Taken.
defendLost.consequence:
RECONQUEST WINDOW OPEN: 72H.
YOUR DEFENCE IS RECORDED.

defenderAccept.errNotInAlliance: You're not in this alliance anymore.

commandPost.title: COMMAND POST
commandPost.allClearSub: No one's slipping tonight. Keep them moving.
commandPost.radarFootnote: Flag it, then reach them in real life. A message tonight beats a lost member.
commandPost.rosterFootnote: Ranked by consistency, not output. Steps are shared, never scored.
commandPost.shareBody: {{alliance}} this week — {{distance}} km walked, {{territories}} territories held, {{participation}}% turned out, longest streak {{streak}} days. We move together. #Dominia
commandPost.errNotFounder: The Command Post is the Founder's alone.
commandPost.errLoad: Couldn't reach the Command Post. Head back and try again.

weeklyTask.partDoneSub: Every step still counts for the alliance.
weeklyTask.marchesFrom: You march with the alliance from Monday.
weeklyTask.lastWeekMissed: Last week: {{task}} fell short. No shares paid.
weeklyTask.lastWeekNoShare: Last week: {{task}} — the alliance finished without you.
weeklyTask.pickLockedWith: Orders are set: {{task}}. The pick window opens Saturday.
weeklyTask.pickOpensSaturday: The pick window opens Saturday. Choose before Sunday midnight.
weeklyTask.pickLead: Set the alliance's task for the week of {{date}}.
weeklyTask.pickFootnote: Orders can be changed until Sunday midnight.
weeklyTask.pickViewOnly: Only the Founder and Marshals set orders.
weeklyTask.breakdownFootnote: Contributions count from the Monday roster. New joiners march from next Monday.

warRoom.title: WAR ROOM
warRoom.warChestSub: Pooled from member donations · powers all abilities
warRoom.alertActivateBody: Costs {{cost}} Morale from the war chest.
warRoom.alertFailedBody: Could not activate ability. Try again.
warRoom.errMorale: Not enough Morale in the war chest.
warRoom.errCooldown: Ability is cooling down. Wait for the timer.
warRoom.errUsedWeek: Supply Line already ran this week. Resets Monday.
warRoom.errWindowWeekend: Attack Day ability. Saturday and Sunday only.
warRoom.errWindowWeekday: Supply Line runs Monday to Friday only.

warSurge.name: WAR SURGE
warSurge.effect: Attacker Iron costs −40% for all contests opened during window.

ironBulwark.name: IRON BULWARK
ironBulwark.effect: Contesting any alliance territory costs 40% more Iron.

rallyCry.name: RALLY CRY
rallyCry.effect: Attackers walk 80% of the normal contest distance.

steadfast.name: STEADFAST
steadfast.effect: Defenders only need to walk 80% of attacker distance.

supplyLine.name: SUPPLY LINE
supplyLine.effect: All earn events pay +20% XP and resources for all members.

profile.errNoPlayer: No player record for this account.
profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.passwordChangedBody: Other devices have been signed out.
profile.passwordChangeFailed: Couldn't change password. Check your current password.
profile.deleteModalBody: This permanently erases your commander and everything tied to it — territories, XP, streaks, medals, resources and chat messages. There is no way back.
profile.deleteFailedBody: Something went wrong and your account was not fully deleted. Check your connection and try again.
profile.alertHangOnBody: Your account is still loading. Try again in a moment.
profile.alertPhotoBody: Allow photo access in Settings to set a profile picture.
profile.alertReadImageBody: Could not read the selected image.
profile.alertAlmostBody: Your picture uploaded but did not sync to the game. Reopen Profile to retry.
profile.alertUploadGenericBody: Something went wrong setting your picture. Please try again.

unlock.claimer: Found or join an Alliance. Solo protection ends; Founders can now view your profile
unlock.warlord: Your name carries weight across the realm

activity.title: ACTIVITY
activity.permText: Health data is locked. Grant Health Connect permissions (steps, active calories, distance) to start earning from daily challenges.
activity.permTextPartial: Some Health Connect permissions are missing (active calories or distance). Grant them to unlock all challenge types.
activity.taskTempoEasy: Hold a brisk pace for 10 min (5 km/h)
activity.attackDayBody: No drills on weekends. Attack, defend, hold what's yours. Challenges return Monday.
activity.levelUp4Body: Other Commanders can challenge your territories now — but Alliance forces still can't touch you. Walk more. Hold more.

createAlliance.step1Body: Both names are permanent. The short name cannot be changed after founding.
createAlliance.emblemHint: Chosen once · shown on the map
createAlliance.step2Body: Your HQ anchors the alliance on the map. Choose a territory you already hold.
createAlliance.couldNotLoadProfile: Could not load your player profile. Try again later.
createAlliance.noTerritories: You hold no territories yet. Claim one from the map before founding an alliance.
createAlliance.step3Body: Founding is permanent. The short name cannot be changed.
createAlliance.errShortNameTaken: That short name is already taken. Pick another.
createAlliance.errInvalidShortName: Short name must be exactly 3 uppercase letters.
createAlliance.errAlreadyInAlliance: You are already in an alliance.
createAlliance.errHqNotOwned: You must own the HQ territory.
createAlliance.errHqCityMismatch: HQ must be in your home city.
createAlliance.errLevelTooLow: You must be Level 3 to found an alliance.
createAlliance.errPlayerNotFound: Account error. Try signing out and back in.
createAlliance.errGeneric: Could not create alliance. Try again.
createAlliance.errNameTooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters.

wallet.title: MY RESOURCES
wallet.alertDonateBody: This will be added to your alliance war chest.

iron.label: IRON
iron.earn: Earn from calorie challenges & contest wins

stone.label: STONE
stone.earn: Earn from step challenges & defence wins

chat.noCityBody: Set your home pin to join your city chat.
chat.noAllianceBody: Join an alliance to chat with your alliance.
chat.noMessagesBody: Be the first to say hi.
chat.title: CHAT
chat.roomForbidden: You no longer have access to this room.

alliance.noAlliancesInCity: No alliances in your city yet.
alliance.topContributorsEmpty: No one has marched yet this week.
alliance.transferBody:
Make {{target}} the Founder of {{alliance}}?

You will be demoted to {{role}}.

This cannot be undone except by the new Founder.
alliance.blockedBody: As Founder, transfer your role to another member before leaving. Use the alliance settings to promote a Marshal.
alliance.disbandBody: This alliance will be permanently disbanded. The HQ territory will become neutral and can be claimed by anyone. This cannot be undone.
alliance.leaveBody: You will lose access to alliance chat, missions, and HQ. You can join another alliance later.
alliance.errAlreadyInAlliance: You are already in an alliance.
alliance.errNotSameCity: This alliance is in a different city.
alliance.errLevelTooLowJoin: You must be Level 3 to join an alliance.
alliance.errAllianceFull: This alliance is at full strength.
alliance.errAccount: Account error. Try signing out and back in.
alliance.errNotInAlliance: You are not in an alliance.
alliance.errTargetIneligible: Only Marshals and Officers can be promoted to Founder.
alliance.errOnlyFounderDemote: Only the Founder can demote members.
alliance.errActorNotInAlliance: You are not in this alliance.

allianceJoined.subtitleJoined: You're no longer alone on this map.

benefitsFounded.title: Collective defence
benefitsFounded.sub: Alliance members can defend your territories.

benefitsFounded.title: Shared War Chest
benefitsFounded.sub: Pool resources to fund alliance abilities.

benefitsFounded.title: Alliance colour
benefitsFounded.sub: Alliance-held territories now display in Alliance green.

benefitsFounded.title: Alliance missions
benefitsFounded.sub: Weekly shared goals. Complete together for resources.

benefitsFounded.title: Recruit up to 19 Commanders
benefitsFounded.sub: Invite by username. Bring in players who haven't joined yet.

benefitsJoined.title: Collective defence
benefitsJoined.sub: Alliance members can defend your territories.

benefitsJoined.title: Shared War Chest
benefitsJoined.sub: Pool resources to fund alliance abilities.

benefitsJoined.title: Alliance colour
benefitsJoined.sub: Your territories now display in Alliance green.

benefitsJoined.title: Alliance missions
benefitsJoined.sub: Weekly shared goals. Complete together for resources.

benefitsJoined.title: Welcome the Commander
benefitsJoined.sub: Existing members will see you in their roster.

map.capReachedSub: Level up to claim more territories
map.abandonAlertBody: You will lose control of this territory. This cannot be undone.
map.earnIron: Earn Iron by completing daily challenges.
map.earnGold: Earn Gold by completing daily challenges.
map.devD4Weight: {{name}} becomes a Citadel. Permanent. It will outlast every commander who holds it — including you.

devErr.changed: Development state changed. Reopen the territory.
devErr.notOwner: Only the holder can develop this territory.

startErr.beingClaimed: Available in {{countdown}} - another player is claiming
startErr.activeInProgress: You're walking for another territory. Finish or wait {{countdown}} for expiry.
startErr.generic: Couldn't start claim. Tap to retry.

contestErr.noOwner: Territory is no longer owned. Try claiming it instead.
contestErr.cannotContestOwn: You can't contest your own territory.
contestErr.levelTooLow: Reach level {{level}} to contest a {{tier}} territory.
contestErr.outsideHours: Contests run 05:00–22:59 in your local time.

topBannerErr.playerNotFound: Couldn't load your account. Try again.
topBannerErr.invalidTier: Couldn't load territory data. Try again.
topBannerErr.contestData: Couldn't load contest data. Try again.

map.intro: This is {{city}}. Every outlined shape is real territory that you can occupy by walking.
map.introNoCity: This is your city. Every outlined shape is real territory that you can occupy by walking.
map.colours: Empty territories are unclaimed. Red marks what you hold. Green marks your allies. Blue marks your rivals.
map.card: Tap any territory to see its name, its owner, and the distance you'd walk to take it.
map.resources: Iron, stone, gold, morale. Your war chest, earned by moving.

activity.streak: Move every day and the streak grows. Longer streaks earn a bonus when attacking and defending territories.
activity.health: Dominia reads steps, distance, and calories from Health Connect. No data, no earnings.
activity.challenges: One discipline per day, Monday to Friday. Pick a tier, hit the number, collect the resources — the featured discipline pays extra.
activity.achievements: Your daily performance, measured against your best.

alliance.solo: You fight solo for now. Alliances open at Level 3 — up to 20 Commanders holding land together.
alliance.list: These alliances already hold ground in your city. Join when you are eligible, or found your own.

profile.identity: This is how the city sees you — name, rank, record.
profile.power: Power is your total strength: activity, territory, and legacy combined.
profile.xp: Challenges and contests earn XP. Fill the bar, take the next rank.
profile.territories: Every territory you hold, listed here. It starts filling up when you claim territories.
profile.resources: Your war chest. Tap in to see what each resource buys.

leaderboards.boards: Three boards — Power, Territory, Battles — ranked across your whole city.

chat.room: City chat — every Commander in {{city}} can hear you. Alliance chat opens when you join one.
chat.roomNoCity: City chat — every Commander in your city can hear you. Alliance chat opens when you join one.

activityLog.feed: Every claim, contest, and fall in the city, as it happens.

wallet.intro: What you've earned and what it buys. Each card shows how to earn it and where to spend it.

firstClaim.sheetLine: Walk {{distance}} around it and your name goes on the map. Your first three claims are free.
firstClaim.couchClose: Every colour on this map is a real person who walked for it.
firstClaim.tapClaim: This is the one. Start the claim.
firstClaim.activeHint: Walk anywhere. The ring fills as your distance adds up.
firstClaim.successBody: Your first territory. It pays Influence every day you hold it.

resourceIntro.stone: Stone earned. Spend it to defend and develop your territories.
resourceIntro.iron: Iron earned. Spend it to contest enemy territory.
resourceIntro.gold: Gold earned. Spend it to claim territory.
resourceIntro.morale: Morale earned. It feeds your alliance war chest — when you have one.
resourceIntro.xp: XP earned. Fill the bar, take the next rank.
resourceIntro.influence: Influence flows from every territory you hold.

notifPrime.title: Dominia warns you when your land is under attack.
